'''鈭歾-h-ng-r''' ('''kazahngeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machinate|machinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machinate|machinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-h-ng-r
|-
! Lemma
| kazahngeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizahngeroko|thizahngeroko]] || [[word:jizahngeroko|jizahngeroko]] || [[word:shizahngeroko|shizahngeroko]] || [[word:kizahngeroko|kizahngeroko]]
